jobs.title: Head Girls Wrestling Coach (no teaching assignment)
jobs.description: This Head Girls Wrestling Coach assignment is for the 2026-2027 school year with no expectation of a teaching assignment.WCSD coaches are required to meet all UHSAA certification requirementspriorto starting assignment and are required to maintain certifications during duration of employment.If any additional questions, applicants can contact the Athletic Director, Darren Hadley at darren.hadley@washk12.org.A stipend will be provided for this assignment.

jobs.title: Head Boys Volleyball Coach (no teaching assignment)
jobs.description: This Head Boys Volleyball coaching assignment is for the 2026-2027 school year with no expectation of a teaching assignment.WCSD coaches are required to meet all UHSAA certification requirementspriorto starting assignment and are required to maintain certifications during duration of employment.If any additional questions, applicants can contact the Athletic Director, Gabi Hasenbeck, at gabi.hasenbeck@washk12.org.A stipend will be provided for this assignment.

jobs.title: Head Softball Coach (no teaching assignment)
jobs.description: This Head Softball coaching assignment is for the 2026-2027 school year with no expectation of a teaching assignment.WCSD coaches are required to meet all UHSAA certification requirementspriorto starting assignment and are required to maintain certifications during duration of employment.If any additional questions, applicants can contact the Athletic Director, Dustin Drake,  at Dustin.drake@washk12.org.A stipend will be provided for this assignment.

jobs.title: Head Boys Wrestling Coach (no teaching assignment)
jobs.description: This Head Boys Wrestling coaching assignment is for the 2026-2027 school year with no expectation of a teaching assignment.WCSD coaches are required to meet all UHSAA certification requirementspriorto starting assignment and are required to maintain certifications during duration of employment.If any additional questions, applicants can contact the Athletic Director, Mike Bair, at mike.bair@washk12.org.A stipend will be provided for this assignment.

jobs.title: Health and Safety Assistant
jobs.status: Part Time, 17.5 hours per weekMinimum Requirements:High school graduation or other equivalent, (i.e., GED, college, technical or trade school, foreign equivalency, etc.).  Experience working with children.  Medical experience or training and clerical experience preferred.Must hold and maintain the following certificates:*Current First Aid certificate from the American Heart Association, American Red Cross, or other similar organization.*Current Cardiopulmonary Resuscitation (CPR)/Automated External Defibrillator (AED)certification from the American Heart Association, American Red Cross, or other similar organization.Certifications must be maintained for the duration of the assignment. Certification training must include a hands-on component.The salary for this position is assigned to Lane 4 of the SC Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkSC Salary Schedule.Attachment(s):Health & Safety Assistant.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version

jobs.status: On-Call/As NeededMinimum Requirements:EDUCATION and/or EXPERIENCEAssociate's degreeor48 semester hours from an accredited college/universityorpassing results on an approved Paraprofessional Assessment.Consideration will be given to individuals with equivalent work experience specific to working with students with emotional/behavioral disabilities.CERTIFICATES, LICENSES, REGISTRATIONSMust have a Registered Behavior Technician (RBT) Certification issued by the Behavior Analyst Certification Board (BACB).Will be required to complete the following training within 12 months of contract start date:WCSD Intensive Behavior Intervention (IBI) Training Level IWCSD Intensive Behavior Intervention (IBI) Training Level IIThe salary for this position is $30.17 per hour.Attachment(s):Registered Behavior Technician.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version

jobs.title: Substitute Bus Driver Trainee
jobs.status: Part Time, On-Call/As NeededMinimum QualificationsMinimum age of 21 years.Have no more than 100 points recorded on past driving record.  No more than two at-fault accidents, two citations, or a combination of one at-fault accident and one citation, in a 24 month period.Hold and maintain a Utah Commercial Drivers License.  Driver Training will be provided if candidate needs to obtain the Utah Commercial Drivers License.The salary for this position is assigned to the BD Salary Schedule AFTER completion of training.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkBD Salary Schedule.APPLICANTS ARE REQUIRED TO ATTACH/UPLOAD A COPY OF THEIR CURRENT DRIVING RECORD WITH THE APPLICATIONA copy of the driving record can be obtained from the Department of Motor Vehicles.Attachment(s):Bus Driver & Sub Bus Driver.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
jobs.salary_information: Schedule AFTER completion of training.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkBD Salary Schedule.APPLICANTS ARE REQUIRED TO ATTACH/UPLOAD A COPY OF THEIR CURRENT DRIVING RECORD WITH THE APPLICATIONA copy of the driving record can be obtained from the Department of Motor Vehicles.Attachment(s):Bus Driver & Sub Bus Driver.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
